revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Profile: snes16_platformer_v1
Preset: village_house_128_96
Asset kind: field-prop
Asset type: prop
Canvas / sheet: exactly 128x96 pixels, 1 row x 1 column, one frame only. Frame size 128x96 px.
Background: solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, no gradients, no texture in the background.

Subject: ONE Japanese village wooden house as a single coherent authored pixel-art object, not repeated tile stamps. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: muted matcha and moss greens with vermilion-and-white accents. Dark tiled kawara roof, two-tone wooden walls, sliding entrance, paper lantern hanging by the entrance, small noren curtain, stone step, vermilion cord charm by the door, soft contact/contact grounding shadow. Three-quarter front view. Slightly different silhouette from a farmhouse. Fills most of the canvas while leaving a clear solid magenta margin on every edge.

Pixel-art style: crisp low-resolution 16-bit SFC/SNES-style pixel art, hard square pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, top-left light source, dark one-pixel outline where useful, fine readable pixel clusters. It may later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles, but the viewer must perceive one coherent large building. Break the rectangular box silhouette with roof overhangs, chimney, uneven eaves, trim, windows, door detail, varied roof and wall texture, subtle dirt, shadow, and small props while preserving a clean readable collision footprint.

Cleanliness requirements: no cell separator lines, no grid lines, no frame borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark, no UI. No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, or leftover residue. Every visible non-background pixel belongs to the house or its contact shadow. Keep the whole object inside the 128x96 frame with margin.

Avoid entirely: Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, UI.
